title: Learning Progress
description: Schema for progress.json — per-concept status, timestamps, and notes tracking

statuses.description: Ordered list of valid status values

last_updated.description: ISO date of the last time any concept entry was modified (e.g. '2026-05-17')

concepts.description: Map of concept ID (snake_case, matches concepts.json) to its progress entry

started_at.description: ISO date when the concept was first studied, null if not yet started

completed_at.description: ISO date when the concept was marked Done, null if not yet complete

notes.description: True when a concept folder with main.md exists under concepts_dir
